verdict: PROMISING POSITIVE, permutation-validated — BUT pre-registered primary endpoint underpowered at n=131. Does NOT cleanly clear the pre-registered 80 bar; needs replication on a 2nd combinatorial dataset.

substrate.dataset: Norman 2019 GSE133344 (reconstructed from raw matrix on disk)

synergy_is_real.note: additive baseline fails precisely where synergy is high

leakage_safe_prior.s_hat: sum of single-effect magnitudes (singles only, never the double)
leakage_safe_prior.note: orthogonal single directions -> more synergy; leakage guards enforced
leakage_safe_prior.label_correction_note: AUDIT FIX: field previously held 0.472 (which is corr(residual,shat)); the shat->true-synergy corr is 0.667. Conclusion (prior predicts synergy) unchanged.

primary_endpoint_PREREGISTERED.metric: per-fold synergy-tercile conditional-coverage gap, perm p<0.01
primary_endpoint_PREREGISTERED.result: FAILED — noise-dominated. Noise floor at ~5 pairs/tercile is 0.147 even under perfect calibration, so this endpoint cannot resolve the effect at n=131.

directional_analysis_WELL_POWERED.design: pooled high-synergy vs low-synergy marginal coverage across 50 shuffles
directional_analysis_WELL_POWERED.note: vanilla under-covers hard cases exactly as constant-width theory predicts; SCC restores toward nominal. NOT the pre-registered confirmatory test (resamples same 131 pairs), reported as directional evidence.

permutation_null.interpretation: shuffling the synergy prior destroys the calibration restoration -> the effect is genuine synergy signal, not a width artifact. F2 and F3 do NOT fire.

mechanism_check.note: SCC widens intervals 2.1x on high-synergy pairs, as designed

honest_conclusion: The open combinatorial wedge (arXiv:2603.02204 leaves synergy-conditioning unaddressed) yields a GENUINE positive: vanilla conformal systematically under-covers high-synergy double perturbations (0.72 vs nominal 0.90), and a leakage-safe synergy prior restores calibration (to 0.81), validated against a permutation null (p=0.005). This is a real novel result. HOWEVER: the pre-registered PRIMARY endpoint (per-fold tercile gap) failed on power at n=131, so per our own frozen tier-rule we CANNOT claim clean 80-clearance. The honest status is a strong, mechanistically-sound, permutation-validated positive on a single dataset that needs replication at the pre-registered bar on a second combinatorial dataset (e.g. Replogle, or a larger double-perturbation screen) to cross 80.
citations: arXiv:2603.02204 (Asiaee, Aryan, Long — 'Partial Causal Structure Learning for Valid Selective Conformal Inference under Interventions', 2 Mar 2026) [VERIFIED via arXiv]
